raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir pirms tee tohß Taunkus
r: eededſtuaja / nahze ta Preesterß
Puifis/ un fazzija us to Wihru/
kas uppureja: Dohd to Gałtu
lam Preesteram zept / jo wiꞥſch
ne grib no tewis wahritu Gałtu/
bet jehlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja kas us to fazzija: Lai
tee Tauki dedsin tohp eededſinati/
kà ſchodcen peeklahjahß / un tad
tas? ka tawa ſetun preeſch tewis / ka tawa
Sirdeß eekahrojahß. Tad fazzija
ſchis us to: Tew nu buhs doht /
bet ja ne / tad nemtchu es ar
Warru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tà bija ſcho Puifchu Greh-
fi ſohti leeli preeſch ta KUNGa /
jo ſchee Wihri nizzinaja ta KUN-
GA Ehdamo-Uppuri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Samuels kalpoja
preeſch ta KUNGa/ weens Pui-
tis buhdams ar weenn linnu Ge-
wodu apjohſts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Mahte darrija
winnam masus Swahrzikus/ un
neffe winnam tohs ik gaddeß /
kad winna ar fawu Wihru nah-
ze to gadſkahrtigu Uppuri up-
pureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Eelus ſwehtija Elka-
nu un winna Seewu/ un fazzija:
Lai tas KUNGß tew dohd Dsim-
munn no ſchahß Seewas /
tahs Luhaſchannß labbad/ ko win-
ra no ta KUNGa ter ſuhguſt.
Un tee gahje us fawu Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGß peemeſ-
leja Annu/ un ta tappe gruhta/
un dſemdeja trihß Dehnß un di-
wi Meitas. Un tas Puifis Sa-
muels uſauge pee ta KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Eelus bija ſohti wezz/
un dſirdeja wiſſiu/ ko winna Deh-
li wiſſam Israëtam darrija / un
katte gulleja pee tahmSeewahm/
kas fapulzejahß preeſch tahß Sa-
eeschanas Telts Durwim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us treim:
Kapehz darret juhs tahdas Lee-
ne irr labba Slawa / ko es dſir-
du/ jo juhs darret ta KUNGA
Laudis pahrkahpam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne/ manni Behrni/ jo ta
ne irr labba Slawa / ko es dſir-
du/ jo juhs darret ta KUNGA
Laudis pahrkahpam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad Zilweks prett kahdu
Zilwekti grehko/ tad warre tee Tee-
fas-Kungi to iſtihdsinaht/ bet kad
Zilweks prett ta KUNGß greh-
ko/ kaß warre preeſch to luhgß
bet tee ne klaufija fawa Tehwa
Balfim / tapehz gribbeja ta-
KUNGß tohs nokaut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Puifis Samuel-
gahje/ un uſauge/ uu patikke i
tamKUNGAM/ir teemGaudim
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weens Deewa Wihr-
nahze pee Eelus/ un fazzija us to
Ta fakka tas KUNGß : nega-
es efimu ſkatdri parahdijees tah-
Tehwa Namman/ kad tee Eaj-
tes-Seine Warais Naina bij
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un efimu to no wiſſah-
Israëta Ziltim few par Preef-
lizzis/ ka tam bij uppureht
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
